reason: The omitted radio button entries (nablarch_radio4/radio5) are purely repetitive list items that follow the same pattern already demonstrated 3 times. An AI agent reading this knowledge file gains complete understanding of radioButtons tag behavior — sequential ID generation, tabindex propagation, value/label output — from the 3 existing examples. The 4th and 5th entries add no new information. The fix did not persist because Phase E correctly determined the truncation was an acceptable editorial choice: the pattern is fully conveyed, and adding identical items provides no instructional value.

findings_assessment.justification: The two omitted entries (nablarch_radio4: 004:yellow, nablarch_radio5: 005:pink) repeat the exact same pattern already shown three times. The critical behaviors — nablarch_radio<N> ID naming, tabindex propagation to all inputs, value/label binding — are fully demonstrated by the three present entries. An AI agent advising on radioButtons tag usage can derive correct guidance without these additional items. Phase E left this unresolved because the omission does not impair knowledge completeness; the fix would add redundant content rather than missing information.
